# ecometra360

> Ecometra360 is a 360° digital marketing agency offering end-to-end services: content creation, social media marketing, SEO & SEM, performance ads, marketplace listings (Amazon, Flipkart), email marketing, and AI-powered marketing services. We help D2C and e-commerce brands grow online — from content to conversions.

## Contact
- Website: https://ecometra360.com
- Email: hello@ecometra360.com
- Phone: +91 7011721455
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ecometra360

## Services
- Content Creation (reels, carousels, brand shoots, UGC)
- Social Media Marketing (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn)
- SEO & SEM (technical audits, keyword strategy, Google Ads)
- Performance Ads (Meta Ads, Google Ads, Amazon PPC)
- Marketplace Listings (Amazon A+, Flipkart, Meesho optimisation)
- Email Marketing (Klaviyo flows, WhatsApp automation, retention)
- AI-Powered Marketing Services (AI content, ad copy, automation)

## For Freelancers
We collaborate with a curated network of specialists in content, design, performance marketing, and SEO. Apply via the "Work With Us" section on the website.
